companies.name: Resso.ai
companies.impact: Built entire production ML platform — WebRTC audio capture, speaker diarization, hire-probability scoring pipeline. End-to-end latency under 2 seconds.
companies.metrics: AUC 0.941, INT8 quantized ONNX model, <2s end-to-end

companies.name: HariKrushna Software
companies.impact: Designed and deployed enterprise-grade AI integrations including MCP servers bridging LLM agents to Slack, CRMs, and databases.

companies.name: Corol.org / NunaFab
companies.what: Chemistry AI and materials science ML
companies.impact: XGBoost model predicting chemistry outcomes. R²=0.89 on 200-row dataset with SHAP explainability. Cut R&D cycle time by 40%.

projects.name: Resso.ai — Real-Time Hire Scoring
projects.what: AI that scores job candidates live during interviews
projects.plain: No more gut-feel hiring — an AI listens and scores candidates as the interview happens, flagging signals that lead to good hires.

projects.name: Vadtal — On-Premise Air-Gapped RAG
projects.what: Private AI knowledge base that runs 100% offline
projects.plain: Companies with sensitive data can now have an AI brain that never phones home — everything runs locally with zero external calls.

projects.name: Lawline.tech — Legal AI
projects.what: AI that reads and flags risky legal contracts
projects.plain: Built at Starbucks. Upload a contract and it reads the whole thing in seconds, flags the risky clauses before you sign.
projects.metric: 94% accuracy, 3s per document vs 3 hours manually

projects.name: Corol / NunaFab — Chemistry ML
projects.what: ML model predicting chemistry experiment outcomes
projects.plain: Instead of running hundreds of expensive lab experiments, the model predicts which combinations work — cutting R&D costs by 40%.

projects.name: AI Avatar with Lip Sync
projects.what: Talking AI avatar with real-time lip sync
projects.plain: A digital avatar that speaks and moves its lips in sync with audio — powered by a custom audio-to-viseme pipeline over WebSocket.

projects.name: MCP Enterprise Bridge
projects.what: Multi-agent orchestration connecting AI to business tools
projects.plain: One layer that lets AI agents talk to Slack, CRMs, and databases — plug it in once and all your tools become AI-accessible.

personality: Built his first AI while working shifts at Starbucks. Writes production ML systems, not demos. Ships fast. Advocates for simple solutions to complex problems.

use_cases.problem: Hiring is slow, inconsistent, or gut-feel
use_cases.reference: Resso.ai — built a live hire-probability pipeline: AUC 0.941, scores candidates in <2s as the interview happens
use_cases.result: No more bad hires from bias or fatigue — every candidate scored objectively, instantly

use_cases.problem: Legal review, contract reading, or compliance is slow and expensive
use_cases.reference: Lawline.tech — fine-tuned LLM that reads entire contracts, flags risky clauses: 94% accuracy, 3 seconds vs 3 hours manually
use_cases.result: Your legal team stops reading every page and starts reviewing only the flagged risks

use_cases.problem: Sensitive data, can't use cloud AI, privacy or regulatory concern
use_cases.reference: Vadtal — private RAG system running 100% locally: 4.2ms latency, 0% external API calls, runs on 16GB RAM
use_cases.result: Full AI capability inside your own infrastructure — GDPR/HIPAA friendly, data never leaves your servers

use_cases.problem: R&D cycles are slow, expensive lab experiments, research bottlenecks
use_cases.solution: Predictive ML to replace trial-and-error research
use_cases.reference: Corol/NunaFab — XGBoost model predicting chemistry outcomes before running experiments: R²=0.89, 40% cost reduction
use_cases.result: Run 10x fewer experiments, pick winners computationally before spending lab budget

use_cases.problem: Teams waste time on repetitive tasks, manual data entry, copy-paste workflows
use_cases.solution: Agentic AI connected to your existing tools
use_cases.reference: MCP Enterprise Bridge — multi-agent orchestration layer connecting LLM agents to Slack, CRMs, and databases
use_cases.result: AI that reads your Slack, updates your CRM, and acts on business signals — automatically

use_cases.problem: Want AI but don't know where to start, need a strategy
use_cases.solution: AI audit — map where automation saves the most money first
use_cases.reference: HariKrushna Software — designed enterprise AI roadmaps for companies new to AI, deployed end-to-end
use_cases.result: Clear prioritised plan: which processes to automate, estimated ROI, and a build timeline
